items.title: Solana DApps revenue falls to 18-month low as SOL price risks $80 retest
items.whyYouShouldCare: The decline in DApp revenue signals reduced ecosystem activity, which could pressure SOL's price and liquidity as it approaches a critical support level.

items.title: Solana Treasury Forward Industries Uses Loan to Buy Back Shares After 89% Price Dive
items.whyYouShouldCare: Forward Industries' share buyback using a loan indicates confidence in its long-term value, which may influence investor sentiment towards SOL's associated projects.

items.title: SOL treasury Forward Industries buys back shares using crypto-backed debt
items.whyYouShouldCare: The use of crypto-backed debt for share buybacks reflects a strategic financial maneuver that could bolster market perception of SOL's underlying assets.
